summary: Completed testing of four NEW features: (1) RCA rejection cycle with reopening to same tech, prefilled answers, rejection reason; (2) Analytics Breakdowns by Type pie chart with Count/Downtime toggle; (3) Admin-only Technician Leaderboard with 5 metric tabs + drill-down cards; (4) Mid-repair WO/breakdown handoff requiring mandatory Pass-On Note. All backend APIs tested and working correctly. Frontend UI elements verified in code review.
passed_tests: BACKEND: RCA rejection full cycle - create RCA, submit 5-Why, complete, admin reject with reason, status back to IN_PROGRESS, assigned_to unchanged, rca retained (prefilled), rca_rejection set, resubmit clears rejection, complete again, admin close
BACKEND: RCA rejection error cases - empty reason rejected (400), tech trying to reject rejected (403), rejecting non-PENDING RCA rejected (400)
BACKEND: Analytics breakdown_types field present with type, count, downtime_minutes for MECHANICAL/ELECTRICAL/CONTROL_PLC
BACKEND: Analytics breakdown_types respects date_from/date_to filters (empty for past dates)
BACKEND: Technician analytics endpoint returns overall_score (0-100) and rca_completed fields
BACKEND: Technician analytics admin-only (403 for tech role)
BACKEND: WO mid-repair handoff requires pass_on_note for IN_PROGRESS status (400 without note)
BACKEND: WO pre-start transfer (ASSIGNED status) works without pass_on_note
BACKEND: WO multiple handoffs append to handoffs array with from/to/note/at/by/mid_repair fields
BACKEND: WO handoff integrity - started_at unchanged after handoff, duration measured from original start
BACKEND: Breakdown mid-repair handoff requires pass_on_note for IN_PROGRESS status (400 without note)

CODE REVIEW: Analytics.jsx - Breakdowns by Type panel (data-testid=analytics-breakdown-types) with donut chart, center total, 3 legend rows, Count/Downtime toggle buttons (bt-mode-count/bt-mode-downtime)

CODE REVIEW: Analytics.jsx - Technician Analytics section (data-testid=technician-analytics-section) with leaderboard panel, 5 metric tabs (lb-metric-overall/breakdowns/mttr/pm/ontime), technician card modal (tech-card-modal)
CODE REVIEW: Analytics.jsx - Technician Analytics section wrapped in {isAdmin && <TechnicianAnalytics />} - correctly hidden for non-admin
CODE REVIEW: WorkOrderModal.jsx - Transfer control with requireNote prop for IN_PROGRESS status, Pass-On Note textarea (wo-detail-transfer-note), handoffs history section (wo-detail-handoffs)
CODE REVIEW: WorkOrderModal.jsx - RCA reject UI with reject button (wo-detail-rca-reject-btn), reason textarea (wo-detail-rca-reject-reason), confirm button disabled until reason entered
CODE REVIEW: RcaForm.jsx - RCA rejected banner (rca-rejected-banner) with rejection reason, previous answers prefilled in 5-Why fields
CODE REVIEW: Shared.jsx - TransferControl component with requireNote parameter, Pass-On Note textarea shown when requireNote=true

success_percentage.frontend: Code review verified - UI elements present with correct data-testid attributes
